title: OSINT Event
description: A standardized schema for normalized OSINT events from various sources.

id.description: The unique internal identifier for the event record.

source.description: Metadata identifying where the event originated.

name.description: The specific channel or website name.

url.description: Direct link to the source if available.

content.description: The core textual and visual information of the event.

text.description: The raw or slightly cleaned text from the source.

summary.description: An LLM-generated summary of the content.

media.description: List of URLs or paths for associated images or videos.

location.description: Spatial representation of the event for map display.

name.description: Human-readable name of the location (e.g., city or address).

precision.description: The accuracy level of the geocoding.

confidence.description: The confidence score of the geocoding process (0.0 to 1.0).

timestamp.description: The date and time the event occurred, in ISO 8601 format.

raw_id.description: The original unique ID from the source (e.g., Telegram message ID).

status.description: Current processing status of the event.
